# QA Plan: Sprint 4 — M4 Monetize: Monetization Service Core
**Date**: 2026-06-15
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 9 stories across 5 systems (Consent/Compliance, IAP, Entitlement, Ads, RemoteConfig/Analytics)
**Engine**: Godot 4.6 (GDScript, gdUnit4 v6.1.3)
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-04.md`

> **Two upfront gaps, flagged not blocking:**
> 1. **No dedicated monetization/consent GDD.** M4 service requirements trace to
>    GAME_PLAN §§8–12, ADR-0005 (audience gating), and the consent rules in
>    `design/gdd/save-service.md` (EC7/EC9/EC15, Core Rule 6, Group 5 ACs). The
>    S4-000 consent-model + service-seam ADRs must capture the testable contract a
>    GDD normally would. Test cases below are derived from acceptance criteria +
>    those sources, not a formula section.
> 2. **No `Type:` field on any story** (planned inline in the sprint doc). All
>    types are **inferred** and should be ratified in the S4-000 ADRs before dev.
>
> **No screenshots required this sprint** — all monetization UI is deferred to a
> `/ux-design` sprint. The mock-first service slice has no player-facing surface.

## Automated Tests Required

### S4-001 — Consent/CMP model + SaveData v5→v6 migration — Integration (+Logic) [BLOCKING]
**Test files**: `tests/unit/save/consent_migration_test.gd`, `tests/integration/compliance/consent_gate_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- v5→v6 migration: a v5 save dict gains the consent fields with **conservative
  (never-permissive) defaults** — personalized-ads / analytics / IAP-consent all
  default to **denied/unknown**, never granted (save-service.md EC9, Core Rule 6).
- Migration step is **idempotent** (re-running v5→v6 on an already-v6 dict is a no-op)
  — guards the downgrade re-run hazard (save-service.md EC9, Formulas → downgrade).
- `from_dict` / `to_dict` round-trip preserves every consent field (a dropped key
  must fail the test — mirror SD-02's "all keys" discipline).
- `ComplianceService.can_show_targeted_ads()` / `can_collect_personal_data()` /
  the IAP gate return the **AND of consent × age_band**: ADULT + consent → permitted;
  ADULT + no-consent → denied; UNKNOWN/CHILD (any consent) → denied.
- Consent flags are read **only through `ComplianceService`** — grep guard: no new
  direct reads of the consent fields outside the service (mirrors the age_band chokepoint).

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Missing consent key in an old/foreign save → conservative default (denied), not granted (EC5/EC9).
- Out-of-range / null consent value → treated as denied (mirror EC7 `_parse_age_band`).
- Save from a **future** schema version (downgrade) → consent fields must NOT be lost
  through the missing-key-default path (EC9 — a lost consent flag is a compliance defect).
- Write failure during a consent change → in-memory value correct for session, gate
  flagged for re-presentation next launch (EC15).
- Withdrawal: a granted flag flipped to denied immediately changes every `ComplianceService` verdict.

**Estimated test count**: ~10–12 unit + ~4 integration

### S4-002 — IAPService interface + mock backend — Integration (+Logic) [BLOCKING]
**Test files**: `tests/unit/iap/iap_service_test.gd`, `tests/integration/iap/iap_grant_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- Purchase state machine: every transition `idle → pending → success` and
  `pending → failed`, plus `restored`; no illegal transition (e.g. success without pending).
- On `success`, the correct grant fires via `WalletService.initiate_iap(sku)` — coins/gems
  credited or Remove-Ads entitlement set, exactly once (no double-grant on duplicate callback).
- `restored` re-grants the **non-consumable** entitlement (Remove-Ads) but does NOT
  re-credit consumable currency packs (receipt-restore semantics).
- Catalog is read from config (S4-006 path) — no hardcoded SKU/price/amount.
- Mock backend is injectable via `configure()`; zero real SDK dependency.
- IAP surface gated by `ComplianceService`: a restricted (child/unknown) user is never
  offered an IAP purchase (deck-economy.md L30, ADR-0005).

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Purchase fails mid-flight (network/cancel) → wallet unchanged, state returns to a clean idle.
- Duplicate success callback for one purchase → single grant (idempotent).
- Restore with no prior purchases → no grant, no error.
- Unknown/invalid SKU → rejected, no grant.

**Estimated test count**: ~8–10 unit + ~3 integration

### S4-003 — Remove-Ads EntitlementService — Integration (+Logic) [BLOCKING]
**Test files**: `tests/unit/entitlement/entitlement_service_test.gd`, `tests/integration/entitlement/remove_ads_gate_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- Entitlement persists via the **shared v6 migration** (same step as S4-001 — assert
  one migration adds both consent + entitlement fields; no second `if version == 5:` block).
- Entitlement round-trips through `from_dict`/`to_dict`; missing key → not-owned default.
- Restore-across-reinstall stub sets the entitlement from a (mock) receipt.
- When owned: interstitials suppressed; rewarded ads still available (deck-economy/§9).
- When not owned: interstitials allowed (subject to S4-004 gating).

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Fresh install (no entitlement field) → not owned.
- Entitlement set, then save-write fails (EC4/EC15) → re-presents/re-checks next launch, never silently un-owned mid-session.
- Granted via both IAP (S4-002) and restore → idempotent (owned is owned).

**Estimated test count**: ~6–8 unit + ~2 integration

### S4-004a — AdService interface + mock + frequency cap + rewarded earn-in — Integration (+Logic) [BLOCKING]
**Test files**: `tests/unit/ads/ad_service_test.gd`, `tests/integration/ads/rewarded_earn_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- Interstitial **frequency cap** driven by `TimeProvider` (deterministic, no `Time.*`):
  not shown more often than the configured every-N-levels AND min-seconds-apart (§9).
- Rewarded completion calls `WalletService._earn_rewarded_ad(amount)`; wallet balance
  reflects the reward exactly once; amount comes from config (no hardcoded value).
- `is_ad_earn_available()` respected — rewarded earn honors the daily cap already in WalletService.
- No ad offered "during active arithmetic" (§9) — the no-mid-puzzle rule is enforced.
- Mock backend injectable via `configure()`; zero real SDK dependency.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Two interstitial requests inside the min-interval → second suppressed.
- Rewarded ad dismissed/abandoned before completion → no earn.
- Rewarded earn at/over the daily cap → earn refused, wallet unchanged.
- Cap window rollover via TimeProvider UTC day key → counter resets deterministically.

**Estimated test count**: ~8–10 unit + ~3 integration

### S4-004b — AdService consent/entitlement cross-gating — Integration [BLOCKING, Should-Have]
**Test file**: `tests/integration/ads/ad_gate_matrix_test.gd`
**What to test**: the triple-gate cross-product —
- `ComplianceService` (audience): ADULT vs UNKNOWN/CHILD.
- Consent (S4-001): personalized-ads granted vs denied → personalized vs **contextual** ad request.
- Entitlement (S4-003): Remove-Ads owned vs not → interstitials suppressed vs allowed.
- Rewarded ads remain available even when Remove-Ads is owned (opt-in upside).

**Edge cases to cover**:
- ADULT + consent-denied + not-owned → contextual interstitial allowed, never personalized.
- UNKNOWN (no age gate yet) → no ads / contextual-only, regardless of consent state.
- Remove-Ads owned + ADULT + consent-granted → no interstitial, rewarded still offered.

**Estimated test count**: ~6 integration (one per meaningful gate combination)

### S4-005 — Real RemoteConfigSource subclass — Integration (+Logic) [BLOCKING, Should-Have]
**Test files**: `tests/unit/remote_config/remote_source_test.gd`, `tests/integration/remote_config/loader_contract_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- With an injected **stub transport** returning overrides: remote values win over local `.tres`.
- With the stub returning empty / failing: local defaults are used (fallback).
- Malformed payload (wrong types, extra keys) → ignored per-key; never corrupts a valid config; returns `{}` not `null` on failure.
- No real network call in any test (transport fully injected).

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Partial override (some keys present) → those keys remote, the rest local.
- Type mismatch on a key → that key ignored, local kept (forward/backward compat).
- Transport throws/times out → `{}`, local config intact.

**Estimated test count**: ~6–8 unit + ~2 integration

### S4-006 — IAP catalog/offer config resource — Config/Data [ADVISORY, Nice-to-Have]
**Test file**: `tests/unit/iap/catalog_validation_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- Catalog resource loads; every SKU has id, currency-grant or entitlement, and a price tier.
- No duplicate SKU ids; Remove-Ads is a non-consumable; currency packs are consumable.
- Catalog is remote-config-loadable via the S4-005 path (overrides apply).
**Edge cases**: empty catalog → safe; unknown SKU type → rejected at load.
**Estimated test count**: ~4–5 unit

### S4-007 — Analytics seam + monetization funnel events — Integration (+Logic) [BLOCKING, Nice-to-Have]
**Test files**: `tests/unit/analytics/analytics_seam_test.gd`, `tests/integration/analytics/funnel_consent_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- Events (IAP funnel, ad impression/reward) reach the mock sink only when analytics
  **consent is granted** (S4-001) AND `ComplianceService.can_collect_personal_data()`.
- Consent denied / UNKNOWN → no events emitted (or anonymized-only, per ADR decision).
- Interface is vendor-agnostic; mock sink injectable.
**Edge cases**: consent withdrawn mid-session → emission stops immediately.
**Estimated test count**: ~5–6 unit + ~2 integration

## Manual QA Checklist

### S4-000 — Kickoff docs — Config/Data (Docs) [ADVISORY]
**Verification method**: File existence + content review
**Who must sign off**: producer + technical-director
**Evidence to capture**: the committed files
Checklist:
- [ ] `docs/architecture/ADR-00xx-hint-to-picker-design-change.md` exists, Status: Accepted (records *why* Hint→Picker)
- [ ] `docs/architecture/ADR-00xx-consent-model.md` exists, Status: Accepted — includes the **HMAC `age_band` deferral** decision + rationale
- [ ] `docs/architecture/ADR-00xx-service-seam-pattern.md` exists, Status: Accepted (Ad/IAP/Entitlement interface + mock pattern)
- [ ] `production/milestones/m4-definition.md` exists — states M4 scope, success criteria, boundaries, sprint list
- [ ] `production/risk-register/m4-risks.md` exists — **S2-011 stars carryover** logged as an owned, dated open line + the HMAC-deferral risk line

### S4-006 — Catalog spot-check — Config/Data [ADVISORY]
**Verification method**: Spot-check catalog values against GAME_PLAN §8 IAP catalog
**Who must sign off**: systems-designer
Checklist:
- [ ] SKUs match the §8 catalog shape (Remove-Ads, currency packs, starter/value bundle)
- [ ] Price tiers and grant amounts are sane and config-driven (no hardcoded values)

*No story this sprint uses subjective ("feels"/"looks") criteria — nothing to supplement with a playtest protocol.*

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off for this sprint (run `/smoke-check sprint`):

1. Game launches to main scene without crash (autoload graph now includes IAP/Ad/Entitlement/Analytics services).
2. New session / new level can be started; core board loop unaffected by the new services.
3. **Mock IAP purchase** completes and grants currency/Remove-Ads (no real SDK).
4. **Mock rewarded ad** completes and credits the wallet; interstitial respects the frequency cap.
5. **Consent + entitlement gating**: a restricted (UNKNOWN) profile is shown no personalized ads / no IAP surface.
6. Save / load cycle completes across the **v5→v6 migration** with no data loss; consent + entitlement persist.
7. Full gdUnit4 suite green (baseline 596/596 before this sprint — no regressions).
8. No new per-frame allocations or frame spikes (services are event-driven, not `_process` hot paths).

---

## Playtest Requirements

*No playtest sessions required for this sprint.* All Sprint 4 work is non-visible
service core behind the model/view + `ComplianceService` seam; there is no player-facing
surface to playtest until the deferred `/ux-design` monetization-UI sprint.

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (S4-001/002/003/004a/004b/005/007)
- [ ] Manual evidence/doc exists for the Config/Data stories (S4-000 files committed; S4-006 spot-check noted)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions — full gdUnit4 suite green (≥596 + new tests)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story status updated in `production/sprint-status.yaml` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] No S1/S2 bugs in delivered features
